title: athyrium wardii var. glabratum
intro: Athyrium wardii var. glabratum, also known as the smooth lady fern, is a rare and endangered variety of fern native to the Himalayas. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The smooth lady fern is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. It is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
